race.comment: TOTOKA (7) demolished a solid field here last start when back in trip over 1200m at this track in BM64 grade. Jumps into the stalking position and can repeat the effort over the extra trip. KOIOS (3) is starting to hit his straps and winning apprentice retains the ride. Kept finding in the heavy conditions to get the job done in a tight finish over 1250m at Taree. Proven at this level and stays in the calculations. DEBELLO (2) resumes. Has won first-up in the past and has a good record over this course and distance. Recent trial winner and not to be overlooked. FINE WINE (11) drops in weight for this after she was comfortably held by TOTOKA when fourth over 1200m here. Minor place chance.
